priority: Digest, HMAC, and streaming context parity
scope: Selected upstream ext/hash rows for md2, md4, md5, GOST, MurmurHash3, sha1, SHA-2/SHA3, Tiger 3-pass, Whirlpool digests, HMAC-md5, file hashing, HKDF, PBKDF2, and stream updates
hash_file and hash_hmac_file over local files, including php-src PHPT sibling fixture-file paths
hash_algos and hash_hmac_algos exact selected inventory order
hash_copy and clone coverage across the selected algorithm inventory
hash_equals constant-time comparison and strict string TypeErrors
invalid algorithm ValueError diagnostics for hash/HMAC/PBKDF2/HKDF
hash_file invalid algorithm and missing-file diagnostics
hash_hmac_file invalid algorithm and null-byte filename diagnostics
hash_init HMAC algorithm and key diagnostics
PBKDF2 and HKDF argument ValueError diagnostics
HKDF basic output and edge-case length and algorithm case-sensitivity diagnostics
raw binary output for file digests
HashContext visibility, HASH_HMAC, hash_init/update/copy/final lifecycle
mhash compatibility functions, MHASH constants, key generation, and invalid-algorithm false returns when PHP_MHASH_BC is available in the oracle
HashContext direct construction visibility diagnostics
finalized HashContext rejection
hash_update_file and hash_update_stream digest accumulation
hash_pbkdf2 and hash_hkdf SHA-256 derivation
MD2, MD4, GOST, HAVAL, sha224, SHA3, RIPEMD, Tiger 3-pass, Tiger 4-pass, Snefru, Whirlpool, sha512/224, and sha512/256 digest/HMAC backends
Adler-32, CRC32, CRC32B, CRC32C, FNV, JOAAT, MurmurHash3, and xxHash digest backends
MurmurHash3 and xxHash seed options for hash and hash_init
MurmurHash3 and xxHash non-int seed deprecation diagnostics
xxHash non-string secret deprecation diagnostics and object __toString exception propagation
SensitiveParameterValue masking in hash exception stack traces
Full upstream hash_algos and hash_hmac_algos inventory rows
HashContext serialization exceptions for HMAC/finalized contexts, malformed-payload diagnostics, xxHash serialized memsize validation, plus round-trip digest continuity for serializable algorithms
Clone safety for active HashContext objects
xxHash stringable secret conversion diagnostics
Controlled CLI filesystem access for PHPT-style script-directory sibling files
non_scope: Full php-src hash error-message parity beyond selected digest/context rows
Exact HashContext native serialized-state byte parity across the full algorithm inventory
next_step: Selected upstream hash PHPT corpus is fully promoted for the current target; exact native HashContext serialized-state byte parity remains documented outside the selected pass-only slice.
